title: bromus catharticus var. striatus
intro: Bromus catharticus var. striatus, commonly known as striated brome or ripgut grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Bromus catharticus var. striatus include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
